title: Staff++
description: Staff++ is a spigot plugin that sets up everything you need to manage players on your server. Reporting, banning, muting, player notes, freezing, staff chat channels, staff modes and so much more.
body:
## 🔧 What is Staff++?
Staff++ is a Spigot plugin that sets up everything you need to manage players on your server.  
It provides reporting, banning, muting, player notes, freezing, staff chat channels, staff modes, and much more.  

The plugin is actively maintained. If something is broken or you have a feature request, just hop on our Discord and ask away.

📖 Learn more in the [Staff++ Wiki](https://wiki.staffplusplus.org)  
💬 Join the [Staff++ Discord](https://discord.gg/Nwvubuz) for support and feature requests.

---

### 🛠️ Feature Descriptions

- **Staff Mode**  
  Activates a special mode granting staff additional privileges like flight, invincibility, and vanish.  
  [Learn more](https://wiki.staffplusplus.org/features/staff-mode)

- **Staff Chat**  
  Enables private communication among staff members, with optional integration to Discord channels.  
  [Learn more](https://wiki.staffplusplus.org/features/staff-chat)

- **Report System**  
  Players can report others via a simple GUI, including selecting reasons and providing details.  
  [Learn more](https://wiki.staffplusplus.org/features/reporting)

- **Mute Management**  
  Lets staff mute disruptive players temporarily or permanently, preventing chat abuse.  
  [Learn more](https://wiki.staffplusplus.org/features/muting)

- **Ban Management**  
  Allows staff to ban players by IP address and view all accounts linked to that IP.  
  [Learn more](https://wiki.staffplusplus.org/features/banning)
  
- **Freeze Function**  
  Temporarily locks a player in place for investigation while preventing them from moving or interacting.  
  [Learn more](https://wiki.staffplusplus.org/features/freezing)

- **Alerts System**  
  Notifies staff about specific events such as player name changes, command usage, or suspicious activities.  
  [Learn more](https://wiki.staffplusplus.org/features/alerts)

- **Vanish Mode**  
  Allows staff to become invisible to players, with configurable options for interactions and visibility.  
  [Learn more](https://wiki.staffplusplus.org/features/vanish)

---

> ⚡ This is just a selection of Staff++'s features.  
> For a full list of functionalities and detailed guides, check out the [Staff++ Wiki](https://wiki.staffplusplus.org).
